facebook.content:
Dear brothers and sisters in Christ,

Today's prayer focus is on our city: "As citizens of heaven, we are ambassadors of hope in every city."

Let us pray: "Lord, establish your kingdom in our city, bringing justice, peace, and righteousness to its streets. Raise up leaders who fear you and govern with integrity. We ask that you bless and expand our city's influence for the glory of your name, Amen."
facebook.fullPost:
Dear brothers and sisters in Christ,

Today's prayer focus is on our city: "As citizens of heaven, we are ambassadors of hope in every city."

Let us pray: "Lord, establish your kingdom in our city, bringing justice, peace, and righteousness to its streets. Raise up leaders who fear you and govern with integrity. We ask that you bless and expand our city's influence for the glory of your name, Amen."



Submit your prayer request

#IncreasingFaith #Intercession #KingdomLiving

instagram.content:
Family

As I look around the table at my loved ones, I'm reminded of the Scripture's call to "train up a child in the way he should go" (Proverbs 22:6).

Lord, I decree an atmosphere of Your presence in every family gathering, where love, respect, and honor for one another are the guiding principles.

tiktok.content: "May the love of Christ transform the way our children think, behave, and interact with one another. We declare: 'our families are rooted in faith, our homes are a haven of love, and our children will know and serve the Lord.' I'm standing in agreement with you. 💯"
